visualizations.title: Fraction & Decimal Equivalence Models
visualizations.description: Formulas showing how to move between fractional representations and decimal place values.

steps.explanation: To convert 3/5: multiply numerator and denominator by 2 to make the denominator 10, which easily translates to 0.6 (six tenths).
To convert 0.375: write 375 over 1000 (since 5 is in the thousandths place), then divide both parts by 125 to simplify.

visualizations.title: Fraction & Decimal Dual Scale
visualizations.description: Watch the slider glide across the scale, highlighting equivalent points as decimals and simplified fractions.
